description_long: This object is a small, house-shaped structure with a flat, overhanging white roof and walls covered in a blue wallpaper featuring a repeating pattern of white clouds. The front side has a white door with horizontal panels, and the adjacent view shows the door open, revealing a wooden floor and a glimpse of an interior. The rear and side views each display a white-framed window with two horizontal panes, set against the same cloud-patterned wallpaper. The structure is compact and boxy, with clean, simple lines and a playful, childlike aesthetic reminiscent of a toy or themed decor. The materials appear to be primarily painted wood or MDF, with some plastic or glass for the window panes. There are no visible light fixtures, bulbs, or lamp components present on any side.
description: A small, house-shaped object with a flat white roof, blue cloud-patterned walls, a white door, and white-framed windows. The design is playful and simple, resembling a toy house or themed decor.
description_view_0: Front view showing a closed white door centered on a blue wall with white clouds.
description_view_1: Front view with the white door open, revealing a wooden floor and partial interior.
description_view_2: Rear or side view with a white-framed window set in the blue cloud-patterned wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also featuring a white-framed window on the blue cloud-patterned wall.
